caption: A person's hands are shown opening a product box on a dark surface in a room with a white wall. The box is gray and white, featuring the text "CLEARLY AUTHENTIC". In the first two frames, the person lifts a white inner cover to reveal the contents. In the final two frames, they extract a clear protective case containing a trading card. A small inset video in the corner shows a man wearing a black shirt and a white baseball cap. Various logos and text are overlaid on the screen, including "JASPYS" and "CASEBREAKS" in large, stylized orange and white lettering. The background includes a small red and white object on the table. As the sequence progresses, the focus shifts from the act of opening the box to the retrieval of the individual card case.
